Petition To Confirm Title Of Real Property Belonging To Estate [Probate Code 850(A)2 (C)] And To Award Possession Of Real Property Belonging To Estate [Probate Code 850(A)2(D)]
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Norman Reitz for Thomas Miller (Executor/Petitioner).
Alan Clair in Propria Persona.

Mr. Clair presented oral objections. Mr. Reitz stated that the pleadings are self proving. The Court stated that it is just confirming title of the property in the Estate and that if Mr. Clair has an interest in the property, he needs to hire an Attorney. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Title of Real Property, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Confirm Title Of Real Property Belonging To Estate [Probate Code 850(A)2 (C)] And To Award Possession Of Real Property Belonging To Estate [Probate Code 850(A)2(D)]

Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Continued To Jun-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Continued To Jun-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Abbott specially appearing for Attorney Norman Reitz for Petitioner.

Mr. Abbott stated that they did an on-line search on a program called Locate Plus, that it searches for parents and the Decedent, that it found nothing and that it found the Attorney in Florida who created the parents Trust. Mr. Abbott also that the Attorney was interviewed and that the Attorney was unaware of any other relatives of the Decedent. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a supplement that fully explains what was done with the search and what steps could be done to locate Heirs, and any results.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
